tool_calls: ls -l /data/visitors.csv 2>/dev/null || echo 'missing' && if [ -f /data/visitors.csv ]; then echo '---'; head -n 5 /data/visitors.csv; fi

declare -A country_map=(
  [US]='United States'
  [GB]='United Kingdom'
  [DE]='Germany'
  [JP]='Japan'
  [FR]='France'
)

declare -A counts

while IFS=, read -r name country_code; do
  [[ $name == "name" && $country_code == "country_code" ]] && continue

  country_name=${country_map[$country_code]}
  if [[ -z $country_name ]]; then
    country_name="Unknown ($country_code)"
  fi

  echo "$name visited from $country_name"
  ((counts["$country_name"]++))
done < /data/visitors.csv

echo
for country in "${!counts[@]}"; do
  echo "$country: ${counts[$country]} visitors"
done | sort -t: -k2,2nr
declare -A m=( [US]='United States' [GB]='United Kingdom' ); declare -p m; echo "US=${m[US]}"; echo "GB=${m[GB]}"
declare -A m=([US]="United States" [GB]="United Kingdom"); declare -p m; echo "US=${m[US]}"; echo "GB=${m[GB]}"

declare -A country_map=(
  [US]="United States"
  [GB]="United Kingdom"
  [DE]="Germany"
  [JP]="Japan"
  [FR]="France"
)

declare -A counts

while IFS=, read -r name country_code; do
  [[ $name == "name" && $country_code == "country_code" ]] && continue

  country_name=${country_map[$country_code]}
  if [[ -z $country_name ]]; then
    country_name="Unknown ($country_code)"
  fi

  echo "$name visited from $country_name"
  ((counts["$country_name"]++))
done < /data/visitors.csv

echo
for country in "${!counts[@]}"; do
  echo "$country: ${counts[$country]} visitors"
done | sort -t: -k2,2nr

set -x
declare -A m=( [US]="United States" [GB]="United Kingdom" )
declare -p m

declare -A c
k="United States"
((c["$k"]++))
declare -p c
echo "${c["United States"]}"; echo "${c[United]}"

declare -A country_map=(
  [US]="United States"
  [GB]="United Kingdom"
  [DE]="Germany"
  [JP]="Japan"
  [FR]="France"
)
declare -p country_map
while IFS=, read -r name country_code; do
  [[ $name == "name" && $country_code == "country_code" ]] && continue
  printf 'code=<%s> value=<%s>\n' "$country_code" "${country_map[$country_code]}"
done < /data/visitors.csv

declare -A country_map
country_map[US]="United States"
country_map[GB]="United Kingdom"
country_map[DE]="Germany"
country_map[JP]="Japan"
country_map[FR]="France"

declare -A counts

while IFS=, read -r name country_code; do
  [[ -z $name && -z $country_code ]] && continue
  [[ $name == "name" && $country_code == "country_code" ]] && continue

  full_country=${country_map[$country_code]}
  [[ -z $full_country ]] && full_country="Unknown ($country_code)"

  echo "$name visited from $full_country"
  counts["$full_country"]=$(( ${counts["$full_country"]:-0} + 1 ))
done < /data/visitors.csv

echo
for country in "${!counts[@]}"; do
  printf '%s\t%s\n' "$country" "${counts[$country]}"
done | sort -k2,2nr | while IFS=$'\t' read -r country n; do
  echo "$country: $n visitors"
done

tool_outputs.commands: ls -l /data/visitors.csv 2>/dev/null || echo 'missing' && if [ -f /data/visitors.csv ]; then echo '---'; head -n 5 /data/visitors.csv; fi

  fi

  echo "$name visited from $country_name"

done < /data/visitors.csv

echo

done | sort -t: -k2,2nr
